Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

4.7/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust VK Tree & Stump Service LLC to get the job done right.

“VK Tree & Stump Service did an amazing job removing a large oak tree from my backyard. The crew was professional, efficient, and very careful not to damage my fence or landscaping. The stump grinding was thorough, and they cleaned up everything perfectly. Highly recommend!”

Sarah M. Tree Removal
Mar 15, 2025

“I had two large stumps in my front yard that were an eyesore. VK Tree & Stump Service came out and ground them down quickly and efficiently. They filled the holes with topsoil and seeded the area. The price was reasonable, and the service was excellent.”

David K. Stump Grinding
Nov 20, 2024

“VK Tree & Stump Service trimmed several trees on my property, removing dead branches and improving the overall shape. They were very knowledgeable and took the time to explain the best pruning techniques for each tree. I will definitely use them again.”

Emily L. Tree Trimming
Aug 5, 2024

“A large branch fell on my roof during a storm. VK Tree & Stump Service responded immediately and removed the branch safely and efficiently. They prevented further damage to my house and provided excellent customer service.”

John S. Emergency Tree Service
Jan 10, 2025

“VK Tree & Stump Service cleared a large area of land for my new construction project. They removed all the trees, stumps, and brush quickly and efficiently. The site was left clean and ready for building. Highly recommend their land clearing services.”

Jessica R. Land Clearing
Jun 22, 2024

“After a severe thunderstorm, VK Tree & Stump Service helped me clean up the debris and remove several damaged trees. They were very professional and efficient. I appreciated their quick response and thorough cleanup.”

Michael B. Storm Damage Cleanup
Sep 18, 2024
VK Tree & Stump Service LLC

Trusted tree removal professionals serving Minneapolis, MN and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
